speaker: speaker1
text: Would you please show me the necklace in the window ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Is this the one you want ?

speaker: speaker1
text: No , the one next to it .

speaker: speaker1
text: Thanks . What kind of stone is this ?

speaker: speaker2
text: It's a ruby . It is from South Africa . Would you like to try it on ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , please . How much is it ?

speaker: speaker1
text: It looks good . OK . I'll take it .
